# ThreatAlert

> Anonymous, community-driven real-time incident awareness map

ThreatAlert is a free PWA where anyone can report local incidents — crime, fire, disasters, civil unrest — on a shared live map. No accounts. No tracking. Community votes verify reports automatically.

## Live site
https://threatalert.live

## Source code
https://github.com/BaselAshraf81/threatalert

## Features
- Anonymous incident reporting with up to 3 photos
- Community voting (confirm / resolve / flag)
- Push notifications with configurable radius
- 3D globe view of all live incidents
- Installable PWA on iOS and Android
- Auto-expiring incidents by category
